_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: Four DT doses (50 µg/kg) given on alternate days essentially eliminated CGD-expressing GFP+ cells without significantly altering the proportion of KI67+ cells
details: Four DT doses (50 µg/kg) given on alternate days essentially eliminated CGD-expressing GFP+ cells
